actionUnits.condition: Simulate XRSocketInteractor.selectEntered on Floor's XRSocketInteractor (component fileID: 515040908) so that IfPuzzle (MonoBehaviour fileID: 515040909, guid: a4fe0afa74eee4b4d9b3c22a64e1dc6b) receives ObjectSnapped. Current scene config shows correctPiece: {fileID: 0} and linkedIfManager: {fileID: 0}, so assignments are needed. Expected behavior: when an interactable whose transform.name equals correctPiece.name is snapped, IfPuzzle calls linkedIfManager.correctPiece().

Simulate XRSocketInteractor.selectExited on Floor's XRSocketInteractor (component fileID: 515040908) so that IfPuzzle (MonoBehaviour fileID: 515040909, guid: a4fe0afa74eee4b4d9b3c22a64e1dc6b) receives ObjectRemoved. Expected behavior: IfPuzzle calls linkedIfManager.removedPiece(). Note: linkedIfManager is currently unassigned in scene.
